meaning: n.[军]沙林,甲氟膦酸异丙酯(一种用作神经性毒气的化学剂)
examples: When Arun Sarin was boss of Vodafone, he sent his top executives to India to learn about its low-cost business model.
There was infighting on the board worthy of a medieval court, and it ended only when Mr Sarin purged his predecessor's lieutenants.
Many investors were livid: Vodafone's acquisition spree was supposed to be over, and Mr Sarin was accused of paying far too much for Telsim.
Howard-Sarin: The marketer needs to know how long does it take for someone to buy a product?
Some industry pundits speculate that there would not be a strong "cultural fit" between Sarin and Yahoo!
